title: First Cities Flourish
description: Large urban centers such as Uruk grow rapidly in Mesopotamia.

title: Writing Invented
description: Cuneiform writing appears in Mesopotamia, enabling durable records.

title: Bronze Age Begins
description: Bronze metallurgy spreads and supports larger states, trade networks, and armies.

title: Great Pyramid Completed
description: The Great Pyramid of Giza is completed during Egypt's Fourth Dynasty.

title: Code of Hammurabi
description: Babylon's famous legal code is inscribed during Hammurabi's reign.

title: Late Bronze Age Collapse
description: Major eastern Mediterranean kingdoms fall or weaken around the end of the Bronze Age.
